ksa_text: Knowledge of ML platform components and pipeline orchestration, including feature stores, model registries, experiment tracking systems, model serving infrastructure, and the architectural trade-offs between managed and self-hosted ML platforms.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("pipelines?", "orchestrat", "serving infrastructure"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4170); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.
